Email Scams

Guides covering phishing emails, business email compromise, fake invoices, and email impersonation tactics.

Email Scams

Amazon Scam Email: How to Spot and Avoid Fake Emails in the UK

Amazon scam emails trick UK customers into clicking malicious links or entering login details on fake websites. Scammers impersonate Amazon to steal passwords, payment information, and personal data by creating urgent-sounding messages about account problems or suspicious activity.

Updated 2026-04-21

Email Scams

Invoice Redirection Scam: UK Guide to Spotting Fake Payment Requests

Invoice redirection scams intercept legitimate business communications and redirect payment to fraudster bank accounts. This guide shows you how to spot fake invoices, verify genuine requests, and protect your business payments.

Updated 2026-04-21

Email Scams

PayPal Email Scam Signs: How to Check a Message Without Panicking

A checklist for reviewing suspicious PayPal emails and deciding whether a message is genuine.

Updated 2026-04-08

Scam alerts, plain-English checks, and practical guides to help people verify suspicious emails, texts, websites, calls, and offers.
